---
title: 'Cave of Addullam'
date: '2020-05-07T16:46:00.0000000+00:00'
draft: true
blogger_blog: '(My Journal) Fed By Faith'
blogger_status: 'LIVE'
blogger_post_id: '385445520006361705'
blogger_filename: '/2020/05/cave-of-addullam.html'
blogger_source: 'takeout-20260223T235336Z-3-001.zip:Takeout/Blogger/Blogs/(My Journal) Fed By Faith/feed.atom'
categories:
  - 'Prophetic Word'
---

<div><div><i>David departed from there and escaped to the cave of Adullam. And when his brothers and all his father's house heard it, they went down there to him.</i></div><div><a href="https://bible.com/bible/59/1sa.22.1.ESV"><i>1 Samuel 22:1 ESV</i></a></div><div><br></div></div><div>A few days ago, my Muse, Jen, said that she saw me holding a staff.&nbsp;</div><div><br></div><div>I hated that, because it took me back to the days in 2003 where you asked me to pick up the staff.&nbsp;</div><div><br></div><div>I've been feeling like this past two years was a season where you were purging once and for all, the resistance and hurts and hang ups and you were preparing me for a new season.</div><div><br></div><div>Now, JUST now, I felt something drop hard into my spirit.</div><div><br></div><div>I talked with Jen this morning about a vision I had, the Freedom Life Training Center. I told her I have the vision, I can teach, I'm even beginning to be Prophetic, but, running things... I need partners, plural.</div><div><br></div><div>Then I felt led to ask Matthew about Ministry, and he said yes but no, business.&nbsp;</div><div><br></div><div>Then it dropped!&nbsp;</div><div><br></div><div>Hard.</div><div><br></div><div>Very hard. Like a weight on my chest.&nbsp;</div><div><br></div><div>I'm in the Cave of Addullam</div><div><br></div><div>I was anointed. I played for Kings. Some who mistreated me, most who I still honored as best as I could.</div><div><br></div><div>I ran, ran, ran, ran.</div><div><br></div><div>And now life has taken everything from me, stripped me of all identity.</div><div><br></div><div>Everything in me wants to go back to me being a kid by myself, alone, in my room.&nbsp;</div><div><br></div><div>But people are coming now. Community had been on my heart. Big. And it's growing. And now, real people are coming, in my real physical life.&nbsp;</div><div><br></div><div>A team</div><div><br></div><div>Selah</div><div><br></div><div><br></div><div><br></div><div><br></div><div><br></div><div><br></div><div><br></div><div><br></div><div><br></div><div><br></div><div><br></div><div><br></div><div><br></div><div><br></div><div><div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;">
  <a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/1588868674250172-0-0f642d8f168e.png" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;">
    <img border="0" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/1588868674250172-0-0f642d8f168e.png" width="400">
  </a>
</div><div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;">
  <a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/1588868670763150-1-c0747cd1bcca.png" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;">
    <img border="0" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/1588868670763150-1-c0747cd1bcca.png" width="400">
  </a>
</div><div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;">
  <a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/1588868662089533-2-719e1ff67d8f.png" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;">
    <img border="0" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/1588868662089533-2-719e1ff67d8f.png" width="400">
  </a>
</div><div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;">
  <a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/1588868658782724-3-fce6fad0e379.png" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;">
    <img border="0" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/1588868658782724-3-fce6fad0e379.png" width="400">
  </a>
</div><br></div><div><br></div><div><br></div><div><br></div><div><br></div><div><br></div><div><br></div><div><br></div><div><br></div><div><br></div><div><br></div>
